question: I want to change my Health EMI card pin
answer: To change your PIN, please follow these steps: 1. Go to Your relations and select the Health EMI Network Card for which you wish to update the PIN 2. Click on 'Forgot PIN' 3. Enter and then re-enter your new PIN 4. Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number and click on 'Submit'. CTA Label: EMI Card Details, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Card

question: I want to unblock my Health emi card
answer: If card status is 'Inactive' and click to action is No, provide the customer with information regarding the Block reason. Customer wants to unblock his Health EMI Network card or looking for card block reason and his card status is 'Inactive' and click to action is Yes then inform customer that his card is blocked due to Block reason, he can visit EMI Network card page and try unblocking his card by clicking the unblock card button. Also inform the customer that cards which are blocked due to our internal credit policy cannot be unblocked. If Customer wants to unblock his EMI Network card or looking for card block reason If the card status is 'Active' inform the customer that his card is Active. If Customer asks about timeline related to unblocking of card, then inform Timeline and unblock reason also inform the customer that he cannot utilize the Available Loan Offer and Loan offer amount amount if card status is Inactive. CTA Label: EMI Network Card Details, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Card

question: I want to see my Health EMI card number
answer: The number of your Bajaj Finserv Insta EMI Card can be found on the front of your digital card. If you wish to view your Health EMI Network Card number, kindly follow the steps outlined below:Navigate to 'Your relations' and choose the specific Card whose details you wish to view. · Proceed by clicking on the 'View' option. · Authenticate by verifying the OTP sent to your registered mobile number. · Once verified, your 16-digit EMI Card number will be displayed for your viewing.Click on below View EMI Card Button. CTA Label: EMI Card Details, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://relations/cards, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Card

question: I want to increase my card limit
answer: Any increase in the existing Loan offer amount of your Health EMI Network Network Card is dependent on our credit policy. Below mentioned are some factors that can influence such decisions:1. Your CIBIL Score 2. Your EMI Network payment history 3. Your overall credit performance across lenders If there are any changes to your existing credit Loan offer amount in future, we will communicate the same to you on your registered mobile number via notification or SMS.
